title: Fermented German Egg Rolls
description: A dense, midnight-craving German dish featuring fermented egg rolls with a savory tadka finish. Perfect for late-night cravings with a tangy, complex flavor profile.

ingredients.name: fermented egg
ingredients.notes: prepared overnight in a cool, dark place; traditional german fermented egg mixture

ingredients.name: tadka
ingredients.notes: saffron-infused oil with cumin and coriander, heated to 120°C

instructions: Combine fermented egg and all-purpose flour in a bowl; knead for 5 minutes until smooth.
Heat tadka in a small pan to 120°C; maintain gentle heat to avoid burning.
Roll dough into 2cm diameter circles; place a spoonful of tadka in the center.
Fold and seal the rolls, then place on a baking sheet.
